text:
<%me>さん
ハッピーハロウィン！　シエラです！
ちょっとお願いが……

実は、ショップエリアに
ハロウィンっぽいマトイさんの幻創体が
また現れたらしいんです。

しかもですよ！　今回は、なぜか……
私の幻創体まで、いるらしいんです！
もちろん、私自身じゃありません！

どちらの幻創体も敵性反応はなく
おそらく、エーテルの具現化による
別人さんと思われますが……

一応、データを取っておきたいので
様子を見てきてもらえ

Happy Halloween,
<%me>! It's Xiera!
I've got a tiny favor to ask...

It seems that an apparition of Matoi decked out
in Halloween garb has manifested in the
Shopping Plaza.

And not only that! It seems that for some
reason... there's also another apparition
that looks like me! Of course it has nothing
to do with me directly!

None of the apparitions are giving off hostile
signatures, so it seems that they are likely
constructs made of condensed aether...

I would like to collect some data,
so could you go check them both out?
